description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Universal Child Care Program (Infant Care Support): How to use

This program lets families use childcare facilities for up to 10 hours per month without needing to meet work requirements. It's for children aged 6 months to under 3 years who are not already in childcare. You need approval from the city to participate.

【Eligible children】
• Age 6 months to under 3 years
• Not currently enrolled in childcare, kindergarten, recognized child center, family-style childcare, or corporate childcare
• Living in Hanno City

【Participating facilities】
• Akari Nursery Hanno (Yanagi-cho 23-6, capacity 9 children, flexible use)
• Sayuri School Corporation (Midori-cho 2-5, capacity 12 children, regular schedule use)

【Available hours】
Up to 10 hours per month (unused hours do not carry over to the next month)

【Fees】
300 yen per hour (reduced rates available for low-income families and others)
※ Fees may vary by facility. Meals and snacks charged separately at actual cost.

【Ways to use】
• Regular schedule: Use the same facility on fixed days and times
• Flexible use: Use multiple facilities freely

【Steps to start using】
1. Submit approval application (through integrated support system or childcare office)
2. Receive account and register password
3. Book and attend first interview
4. After first interview, make usage reservations
5. Begin using the service

【Important notes】
• Each facility has a capacity limit; you may not be able to use the program if demand is high
• First interview is required (parent and child should attend together)
• If the facility decides special support is needed, you may not be eligible
• If your child turns 3 during the month, use ends the day before their birthday

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kodomoshienbu/hoikuka/13015.html
summary: ℹ️ Universal Child Care Program (Infant Care Support): How to use
